title: Děčín, Ústí nad Labem — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Děčín, Ústí nad Labem: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Děčín is a city in Ústí nad Labem with a population of 48,000. A picturesque North Bohemian town on the Elbe River, dominated by a hilltop castle and surrounded by the dramatic sandstone landscapes of Bohemian Switzerland.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
